data.title: FrogTape® Named Exclusive Painter's Tape of Spring 2026 One Room Challenge®
data.description: Leading premium painter's tape brand, FrogTape®, is showing its commitment to designers and DIY enthusiasts by offering tools tailored for creating remarkable room makeovers. In AVON, Ohio, on April 2, 2026, FrogTape® announced its exclusive partnership as the Painter's Tape for the Spring 2026 One Room event. This collaboration aims to highlight the brand's dedication to innovation and quality in the realm of painting.

data.title: POLYWOOD® Expands Innovation Leadership with Debut of Laguna In-Pool Collection and New Outdoor Planter Line for Spring
data.description: In Syracuse, Indiana, on April 2, 2026, POLYWOOD® introduced its new Laguna In-Pool Collection, setting a new standard for sustainable outdoor living. With over 35 years of experience in all-weather performance and material innovation, POLYWOOD® remains at the forefront of the industry. The new collection is designed to enhance the outdoor living experience with cutting-edge design and durability.

data.title: Active Minds Launches "Your Voice is Your Power" Resource Hub with $1 Million Grant from Google to Address Gen Z Mental Health and Digital Wellbeing
data.description: Empowering young people to advocate for mental health and promote digital wellness, an organization known as Active Minds, received a substantial boost on April 2, 2026. This nonprofit, which is a key player in mobilizing youth and young adults to change perceptions around mental health, secured a generous $1 million grant from Google.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Four Seasons Hotels and Resorts/
data.description: The newly opened Four Seasons Hotel and Residences in Cartagena signifies a shift towards modern luxury in a captivating city. The announcement was made on April 2, 2026, by Four Seasons Hotels and Resorts through PR Newswire. This development marks a significant change in the hospitality industry, offering lavish accommodations in one of the most intriguing cities globally.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: EMCOR Group, Inc., a leading company in mechanical and electrical construction services, industrial infrastructure, and building services, has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per common share. This dividend, announced in NORWALK, Conn., will be paid on April 30, 2026, to stockholders holding shares by April 16, 2026. EMCOR Group, Inc. is a Fortune 500 and S&P 500 member, showcasing its prominence in the industry.

GCC Secretary General: Gulf countries seek normal relations with Iran.

data.title: Purina Pro Plan Launches AdvantEDGE Line with Triple Action Digestive and Senior Formulas for Dogs and Cats
data.description: Purina unveiled on April 2, 2026, their latest offering, Pro Plan AdvantEDGE, a range of probiotic-infused nutrition designed for adult and senior dogs and cats. The product is supported by extensive research conducted by Purina over many years.

data.title: Former FTX engineer settled with CFTC for $3.7M, closing first individual case involving moving billions in customer funds. No civil penalty due to cooperation.
data.description: A professional who developed financial systems handling billions in customer funds had his case closed by the CFTC with no civil penalty. The regulatory body acknowledged his cooperation during the investigation.

data.title: voAIce™ Corporation Acquires TheCRM Corporation™, Establishing the First Unified AI Infrastructure for Automotive, RV, Marine, and Powersports Dealerships
data.description: VoAIce Corporation has recently acquired TheCRM Corporation, merging TheCRM’s live dealership data infrastructure with voAIce Corporation’s AI technology. This union results in a consolidated intelligence system for retail dealerships across the country. DealerCRM will remain operational under the voAIce platform, enhancing the company’s expanding intelligence offerings. VoAIce Corporation serves as the parent company of a rapidly expanding business.

data.title: BZI® Wins Seven 2026 Top Workplaces Awards for Culture Excellence and the Construction Industry Award, Recognizing Multiple Areas of Accomplishment
data.description: In Kanarraville, Utah, BZI® has been honored with seven prestigious 2026 Top Workplaces Awards for their outstanding culture and achievements in the construction industry. This recognition includes accolades for excellence in various areas.
Reports from Israel: a missile fragment has fallen in the Beit Shemesh area. No casualties.

data.title: SIG SAUER Announces Hero's Journey Sweepstakes Winner
data.description: A popular American defense and outdoor products manufacturer, SIG SAUER, recently declared Nick Smith as the lucky winner of the Hero's Journey Sweepstakes that took place on April 2, 2026, in Newington, N.H. Nick is now the proud owner of an exclusive motorcycle that was designed through a partnership between SIG SAUER.

data.title: Nationwide enters centennial year stronger than ever
data.description: In 2025, the operating results highlighted the success of the modern mutual approach. Key highlights include the fifth consecutive year of record growth fueled by modern mutual advantage and a diversified portfolio. The year saw a significant increase in sales and premiums, reaching $73.2 billion, marking a 7% rise from 2024. Additionally, the total adjusted capital surged to $32.8 billion, reflecting a strong financial position for the company.
Reports from Israel: The IDF has detected a new ballistic missile attack from Iran, targeting the Jerusalem area
